PowerShell(npm run *)

PowerShell(node --experimental-strip-types -e "import\('./src/utils/scoring.ts'\).then\(\({calculateMatchPoints}\) => { const t = \(p, r, exp\) => { const got = calculateMatchPoints\(p, r\); console.log\(\(got === exp ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'\), JSON.stringify\(p\), 'vs', JSON.stringify\(r\), '=>', got, '\(esperado', exp + '\)'\); }; t\({home:2,away:1},{home:2,away:1},25\); t\({home:3,away:1},{home:2,away:0},18\); t\({home:2,away:1},{home:2,away:0},15\); t\({home:1,away:0},{home:3,away:1},10\); t\({home:0,away:2},{home:3,away:1},0\); t\({home:1,away:1},{home:2,away:2},18\); t\({home:2,away:2},{home:2,away:2},25\); }\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/rezarahiminia/worldcup2026.git "$env:TEMP\\worldcup2026")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\('C:\\Users\\luis.sobrinho\\Documents\\PROJETOS\\bolao-copa\\IDENTIDADE_NZR\\LOGO NAZÁRIA DISTRIBUIDORA.PNG\\Horizontal\\Nazaria_RGB_Horizontal.png'\); $star = $img.GetPixel\(1200, 1000\); $text = $img.GetPixel\(3000, 1200\); "STAR: R=$\($star.R\) G=$\($star.G\) B=$\($star.B\) A=$\($star.A\)"; "TEXT: R=$\($text.R\) G=$\($text.G\) B=$\($text.B\) A=$\($text.A\)"; $img.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\('C:\\Users\\luis.sobrinho\\Documents\\PROJETOS\\bolao-copa\\IDENTIDADE_NZR\\LOGO NAZÁRIA DISTRIBUIDORA.PNG\\Icone\\Nazaria_RGB_Icone.png'\); "Tamanho: $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)"; foreach \($p in @\(@\(3590,800\), @\(3590,1500\), @\(1500,2000\), @\(2500,3500\)\)\) { $c = $img.GetPixel\($p[0], $p[1]\); "\($\($p[0]\),$\($p[1]\)\): R=$\($c.R\) G=$\($c.G\) B=$\($c.B\) A=$\($c.A\)" }; $img.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\('C:\\Users\\luis.sobrinho\\Documents\\PROJETOS\\bolao-copa\\IDENTIDADE_NZR\\LOGO NAZÁRIA DISTRIBUIDORA.PNG\\Icone\\Nazaria_RGB_Icone.png'\); foreach \($p in @\(@\(1400,800\), @\(2100,800\), @\(600,1800\), @\(2900,1800\), @\(1758,2900\)\)\) { $c = $img.GetPixel\($p[0], $p[1]\); if \($c.A -gt 0\) { "\($\($p[0]\),$\($p[1]\)\): R=$\($c.R\) G=$\($c.G\) B=$\($c.B\) A=$\($c.A\)" } }; $img.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($m = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\worldcup2026\\football.matches.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "TOTAL: $\($m.Count\)"; $m[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; $m[80] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; $m[103] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)
PowerShell(ConvertTo-Json *)
PowerShell(Expand-Archive *)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://worldcup26.ir/get/games' -Headers @{Origin='http://localhost:5173'} -TimeoutSec 20; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "ACAO: $\($r.Headers['Access-Control-Allow-Origin']\)"; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.PSObject.Properties.Name; $json.games[0] | ConvertTo-Json } catch { "ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($t = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\worldcup2026\\football.teams.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $t | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\)|$\($_.fifa_code\)|$\($_.iso2\)|$\($_.name_en\)|$\($_.groups\)" }; '---LABELS---'; $m = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\worldcup2026\\football.matches.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $m | Where-Object home_team_label | ForEach-Object { $_.home_team_label; $_.away_team_label } | Sort-Object -Unique)
PowerShell(New-Item *)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/wc-api/get/games' -TimeoutSec 25; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "PROXY OK: $\($json.games.Count\) jogos"; $finished = $json.games | Where-Object { $_.finished -eq 'TRUE' }; "Jogos encerrados na API: $\($finished.Count\)" } catch { "ERRO PROXY: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $p = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/' -TimeoutSec 10; "APP OK: status $\($p.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ERRO APP: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Remove-Item *)
PowerShell(git *)
PowerShell(git status --short | Select-Object -First 20; '---'; git log --oneline -5 2>&1; '---'; git remote -v; '---'; git branch -a)

PowerShell("Total de arquivos rastreados: $\(\(git ls-files | Measure-Object\).Count\)"; '--- IDENTIDADE_NZR:'; git ls-files IDENTIDADE_NZR | Select-Object -First 5; '--- env/segredos:'; git ls-files | Select-String -Pattern '\\.env'; '--- node_modules/dist:'; git ls-files | Select-String -Pattern 'node_modules|^dist/' | Select-Object -First 3; '--- .claude:'; git ls-files .claude)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://api.github.com/repos/luis-aimnazaria/copa-nzr-2026' -TimeoutSec 15; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "REPO EXISTE - private: $\($j.private\), visibility: $\($j.visibility\)" } catch { "API: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) \(404 = repo privado ou inexistente\)" })

PowerShell($k = 'sb_publishable_W91y-0lKjig9NxnhCYOjog_p24i6RhH'; $h = @{ apikey = $k; Authorization = "Bearer $k"; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json'; Prefer = 'return=representation' }; $base = 'https://euekewokeoiwufkwzfwb.supabase.co/rest/v1'; try { $u = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/users?select=email" -Headers $h -TimeoutSec 20; "1. LEITURA users OK: $\($u.Content\)" } catch { "1. ERRO users: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" }; try { $ins = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/results" -Method Post -Headers $h -Body '{"match_id":"TESTE-CONEXAO","home":1,"away":0}' -TimeoutSec 20; "2. ESCRITA results OK: $\($ins.Content\)" } catch { "2. ERRO escrita: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" }; try { $del = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/results?match_id=eq.TESTE-CONEXAO" -Method Delete -Headers $h -TimeoutSec 20; "3. EXCLUSAO OK \(status $\($del.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { "3. ERRO exclusao: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })
PowerShell($s = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\worldcup2026\\football.stadiums.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $s | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\)|$\($_.name_en\)|$\($_.city_en\)|$\($_.country\)" })

PowerShell("Agora \(local\): $\(Get-Date -Format 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss'\) \(fuso $\(\([TimeZoneInfo]::Local\).Id\)\)"; "Agora \(UTC\):   $\(\(Get-Date\).ToUniversalTime\(\).ToString\('dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss'\)\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://worldcup26.ir/get/games' -TimeoutSec 20; $g = \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).games | Where-Object id -eq '1'; "JOGO 1: $\($g.home_team_name_en\) x $\($g.away_team_name_en\) | placar $\($g.home_score\)x$\($g.away_score\) | finished=$\($g.finished\) | time_elapsed=$\($g.time_elapsed\)" } catch { "ERRO API: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('https://copa-nzr-2026.vercel.app'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -TimeoutSec 15; $js = [regex]::Match\($r.Content, 'assets/index-[\\w-]+\\.js'\).Value; "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\) | bundle: $js" } catch { "$u -> ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; '--- bundle local mais recente: assets/index-BRGVupWx.js')

PowerShell(for \($i = 1; $i -le 6; $i++\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://copa-nzr-2026.vercel.app' -Headers @{'Cache-Control'='no-cache'} -TimeoutSec 15; $js = [regex]::Match\($r.Content, 'assets/index-[\\w-]+\\.js'\).Value; "tentativa ${i} \($\(Get-Date -Format HH:mm:ss\)\): $js"; if \($js -eq 'assets/index-BRGVupWx.js'\) { 'DEPLOY ATUALIZADO!'; break } } catch { "tentativa ${i}: ERRO $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
PowerShell(npx vercel whoami 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2)
PowerShell(npx vercel ls copa-nzr-2026 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 12)
PowerShell(Test-Path .vercel | ForEach-Object { "projeto linkado: $_" }; npx vercel --prod --yes 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6)
